turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi, this is Sam from SunPeak Solar. Is now an okay time?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: I guess, I was curious about solar.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Great. Our panels are top quality and come with a strong warranty.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Okay... how much would it cost for a place like mine?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: It really depends. Someone from our team can go over the details.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks for your time, have a good one.
